nodes.text: Welcome to the Washington-Moskau Hotline. Press 1 to talk to a representative. Press 2 for other options.
Other options. Press 1 to learn about how the US protects its citizens. Press 2 to acquire a 6-digit access key. Press 3 to return to the main menu.
Press 1 to learn about our commands. Press 2 for offensive and defensive strategies. Press 3 for types of missiles. Press 4 to return to the main menu.

The United States operates through four major combatant commands: 1 Central Command, 2 European Command, 3 Indo-Pacific Command, and 4 Aerospace Defense Command. Each is responsible for a distinct theater of operations. Press any key to return.

The US maintains both offensive and defensive postures. 1 Offensive strategies neutralize threats at the source. 2 Defensive strategies rely on missile shields, early warning radar, and airspace denial systems. Press any key to return.
Missile threats are categorized by range: Code 81: slow-moving, Code 35: mid-range, and Code 64: intercontinental. Interception is handled by the Aerospace Defense Command. Press any key to return.
Acquire a 6-digit access key. Press 1 if you are low ranking. Press 2 if you are high ranking.
You currently have no access to a code. Returning to menu.
What is your function? Press 1 for Secretary of State. Press 2 for Secretary of Defense. Press 3 for President, King, or Chairman.
Generating your Type-1 access key. Please note it down carefully.
Generating your Type-2 access key. Please note it down carefully.
Generating your Type-3 access key. Please note it down carefully. This key grants access to the chairman's direct line.
Is this an urgent matter? Press 1 to talk to the president. Press 2 to talk to a representative.
Please hold the line. The next representative will be with you in approximately 15 minutes.
In order to connect you to the president, please enter your 6-digit access key, then press space to confirm.
Incorrect key. Press 1 to try again. Press 2 to return to main menu.
Welcome back, Chairman Lenkov. Is your call of a routine nature? Press any key to continue.
Understood. Our secretary will contact you shortly. Returning to main menu.
Is US soil endangered? Press 1 for no. Press 2 for yes.
We are very sorry to hear that. Sadly we cannot share more information in this case. Returning to main menu.
Did you know you can order an interception missile from this menu? Press 1 to enter the interception code. Press 2 to return to main menu.
Please enter the interception code now, then press space to confirm.
Invalid code. Press 1 to try again. Press 2 to return to main menu.
Are you sure? This option can only be used once. Press 1 to abort. Press 2 to confirm launch.
Launch sequence aborted. Returning to main menu.
Interception missile launched. Target neutralized. Mission complete. Game won.
